mapper.select: SELECT seller_no AS sellerNo, member_no AS memberNo, company_name AS companyName, ceo_name AS ceoName, biz_no AS bizNo, online_sale_no AS onlineSaleNo, tel, fax, zip, addr1, addr2, status, reg_date AS regDate FROM seller_profile ORDER BY seller_no DESC

SELECT seller_no AS sellerNo, member_no AS memberNo, company_name AS companyName, ceo_name AS ceoName, biz_no AS bizNo, online_sale_no AS onlineSaleNo, tel, fax, zip, addr1, addr2, status, reg_date AS regDate FROM seller_profile WHERE seller_no = #{sellerNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO seller_profile(member_no, company_name, ceo_name, biz_no, online_sale_no, tel, fax, zip, addr1, addr2, status, reg_date) VALUES(#{memberNo}, #{companyName}, #{ceoName}, #{bizNo}, #{onlineSaleNo}, #{tel}, #{fax}, #{zip}, #{addr1}, #{addr2}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'READY'), NOW())
